summary.intent: Rebase PR #2663 in openshift-eng/art-tools which adds --extra-image-nvrs option to release-from-fbc pipeline, resolve conflicts with main branch, and address review feedback.
summary.outcome: Successfully rebased onto prod/main, resolved conflicts merging jira_bugs/target_release_date with extra_image_nvrs, added FBC build validation to reject -fbc component NVRs in --extra-image-nvrs, added tests, fixed linting, and force-pushed to update the PR.

repo: release-from-fbc pipeline categorizes NVRs by detecting component names ending with '-fbc'
Project uses ruff format for code formatting and rh-pre-commit hooks
Tests organized in class-based structure (TestReleaseFromFbcPipelineInit, TestCategorizeNvrs, etc.)

code.finding: categorize_nvrs() uses component_name.endswith('-fbc') to detect FBC builds
Extra image NVRs validation checks parse_nvr(nvr)['name'].endswith('-fbc') and raises RuntimeError if FBC builds found

workflow: git push --force-with-lease is safer than --force because it refuses to push if remote has new commits you don't have locally
After rebase, force-push is required to update PR branch since history was rewritten
CodeRabbit bot provides automated review comments that may catch validation gaps

friction: Merge conflicts in __init__ parameters and test file required manual resolution during rebase
Initial implementation had unused 'categorized' variable causing lint failure
Multiple commit-push cycles needed to address reviews and fix formatting
open_items: Depends on aos-cd-jobs#4623 for Jenkins EXTRA_IMAGE_NVRS parameter
CodeRabbit suggested adding tests for run() and CLI branches that weren't addressed
needs-rebase label should clear once CI runs after the push
